title: Artists Give Back
excerpt: As someone who considers herself to be more of a crafter than an artist, I was absolutely honored to contribute to Cloth Paper Scissors' Artists Give Back Fundraiser . They invited 41 people to contribute 4"x4" pieces, and I chose…
body: As someone who considers herself to be more of a crafter than an artist, I was absolutely honored to contribute to Cloth Paper Scissors' Artists Give Back Fundraiser. They invited 41 people to contribute 4"x4" pieces, and I chose to make a reverse applique and embroidered piece. You can see all the beautiful pieces on Etsy, with the proceeds going to The National Breast Cancer Foundation. Do what you love, love what you do.
